## X SMOL WORLD IZ OPEN NAO (в—ҚвҖўбҙ—вҖўв—Қ)вқӨ

- an we sneakied in a X (old Twittr) too (пҪЎпҪҘПүпҪҘпҪЎ)пҫүвҷЎ
- рҹ”Қ SEO MAGIK UPGRAID! Web sit mor easy to find, like puttin tiny lanterns in forest ~вңЁ
- рҹҸ·пёҸ Web sit icon got new look! Now browsur tab has cute kitteh on it ~рҹҗұ

## 5f anniversarry iz ovar... (ВҙпҪҘПүпҪҘ`)

- did a sneeki change to da Genshin 5 yeer party icon, bak to regulur now ~ o( =вҲ©ПүвҲ©= )m

## Laggy blurs, BEGONE! (аёҮ вҖўМҖ_вҖўМҒ)аёҮ

- fuzzy bakground no maeks u laggy an see blury stuffs nao ~ (гғҺв—•гғ®в—•)гғҺ*:пҪҘпҫҹвң§

## Wat doin, Mewmew Candy? (в—•бҙ—в—•вңҝ)

- gibbed all versins "Chaynjlog" badge! Com see owr grow diary! (пҫү>Пү<)пҫү
- remaded da "Furigana Switch" room for Nihongo an Taiwan frens, so cozy nao! (пҪЎвҖўбҙ—вҖўпҪЎ)вҷЎ
- langwedge choozy screen got new fashun too! вҷӘ(^вҲҮ^*)

## Wher iz Mewmew Candy 2dae? (пҪҘПү<)вҳҶ

- game ID an social media acounts can sho nao! Wher Mewmew Candy be? Щ©(в—•вҖҝв—•пҪЎ)Ы¶
- Chinese versins big happy fambly! Malaysia an Singapore versins togever nao! (вҳ…Пүвҳ…)/
- langwedge choozy screen so shiny new! (вү§вҲҮвүҰ)пҫү

## Wan hear ur voice (вҒ„ вҒ„вҖўвҒ„ПүвҒ„вҖўвҒ„ вҒ„)

- Taiwan Chinese versin can has furigana magics too! Go see! (а№‘вҖўМҖг…ӮвҖўМҒ)ЩҲвң§
- all versins has "hooman feedback" mailbox nao, we lissens! (.вқӣ бҙ— вқӣ.)
- new smort langwedge chooser page! Mewmew gesses... dis ur mother lang? (гғ»вҲҖгғ»)?

## Doin da Furigana Magics (гғҺВ°ОҝВ°)гғҺ

- Nihongo versin can has furigana nao! Go use! ~(пҫүв—•гғ®в—•)пҫү*:пҪҘпҫҹвң§
- put smol credit for bakground pikchur artiss in all cornurs, thank u teachur! m(_ _)m

- whole face wearin new liquid glass dress ~ вңЁгғҪ(в—ҸВҙвҲҖ`в—Ҹ)пҫүвңЁ

- changed all "Huayu" to more bettur "Chinese" ~ (пҝЈПүпҝЈ)/

- added langwedge picky menu ~ talk to Mewmew Candy in ur birth lang! гғҪ(вңҝпҫҹв–Ҫпҫҹ)гғҺ

- can speaks many langs nao! English, Chinese (Malaysia), Chinese (Singapore), Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) all OK! ~ вҷӘ(Вҙв–ҪпҪҖ)

## 'Member Mewmew Candy's birfday? (вңҝв— вҖҝв— )

- has birfday remindurs nao! Com wish happi birfday on social media! гғҪ(в—ҸВҙвҲҖ`в—Ҹ)пҫүрҹҺӮ

## Insyd big glow up (пҝЈпё¶пҝЈ)вҶ—

- used blocky cod bricks to rebild evryfing

## Day we meted u (пҪЎвҷЎвҖҝвҷЎпҪЎ)

- How wuz ur furst time seein dis werld? Mewmew Candy tryin hard to maeks nice furst home for u ~ (а№‘вҖўМҒ вӮғ вҖўМҖа№‘)вң§
- pages load fast like ZOOM! вҡЎ(пҫү>Пү<)пҫү
- How u fit in dis new werld? Anywher u from, smol werld always open for u! (fits all hooman rectangles nao) (гҒҘпҪЎв—•вҖҝвҖҝв—•пҪЎ)гҒҘ
- privacy rules page more clearer nao! (вҖўМҖбҙ—вҖўМҒ)ЩҲ

## Grownd extra stronk nao (а№‘вҖўМҖг…ӮвҖўМҒ)ЩҲвң§

- invited Google Analytics 4 butler to help build dream werld! (пҝЈПүпҝЈ)/
- changed to dreamy "Glass Morphism" new skin! вңЁгғҪ(в—ҸВҙвҲҖ`в—Ҹ)пҫүвңЁ

- furst versin out nao, can speak Nihongo! гғҪ(>вҲҖ<вҳҶ)гғҺ
